message.content:
### 1. RENDERING CHECK  
- Page renders correctly: No white/blank screen, broken layout, error overlays/modals, or console errors.  
- Images load properly (featured banner, trending/recently added cards).  


### 2. UI ELEMENTS (Top-to-Bottom)  
- **Header**:  
  - Logo: "AniStream" (left)  
  - Icons: Search (magnifying glass), User (profile), Settings (gear) (right)  
- **Featured Banner**:  
  - Label: "FEATURED" (top-left)  
  - Title: "Chainsaw Man"  
  - Metadata: "TV • 2022 • ★ 85%"  
  - CTA: "Play Now" (green button)  
- **Trending Now Section**:  
  - Title: "TRENDING NOW"  
  - Cards (3 visible):  
    - Card 1: "Chainsaw Man" (TV • 2022, ★ 85)  
    - Card 2: "Mushoku Tensei: Jobless Reincarnation" (TV • 2021, ★ 84)  
    - Card 3: "Demon Slayer" (TV • 2019, partial title)  
- **Recently Added Section**:  
  - Title: "RECENTLY ADDED"  
  - Cards (3 visible):  
    - Card 1: "Demon Slayer" (partial title, ★ 80)  
    - Card 2: "Mushoku Tensei: Jobless Reincarnation" (TV • 2021, ★ 84)  
    - Card 3: "Chainsaw Man" (partial title)  
- **Bottom Navigation**:  
  - Icons/Labels: "Home" (home icon, active), "Browse" (compass), "Schedule" (calendar), "My List" (bookmark)  


### 3. DESIGN MATCH  
- **Dark Premium Theme**: Black background (#000), charcoal cards (#1a1a1a), emerald-green accent (Play Now button, Home nav icon) – ✅ Matched.  
- **Mobile-First Portrait Layout**: Responsive, vertical scroll, compact elements – ✅ Matched.  
- **Featured Banner**: Anime art (Chainsaw Man) with title/CTA – ✅ Matched.  
- **Horizontal Trending Rail**: Cards in a scrollable row – ✅ Matched.  
- **Bottom Mobile Nav**: Home/Browse/Schedule/My List – ✅ Matched (Home is active).  


### 4. VISUAL ISSUES  
- **Text Truncation**:  
  - "Mushoku Tensei: Jobless Reincarnation" truncated to "Mushoku Tensei: J..." in Trending Now.  
  - "Demon Slayer" truncated in Recently Added (Card 1) and Trending Now (Card 3).  
- **Spacing**: Tight spacing between "TRENDING NOW" and "RECENTLY ADDED" sections (minimal vertical gap).  
- **Color Consistency**: "Home" nav icon is green (active), but other nav icons are gray (inactive) – ✅ Consistent with design.  
- **No Overlapping/Errors**: No layout bugs, missing images, or color mismatches.
